description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rust Docker image, sets CARGO_HOME variable to $CI_PROJECT_DIR/cargo, and defines three stages: build, check, and deploy. In the build stage add a build job that runs only on the master branch, runs before_script apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq libssl-dev pkg-config, cargo --version, rustc --version, cargo update, caches the target/ and cargo/ directories (untracked), builds the release binary with cargo build --release, and stores the resulting target/release/discord-markov-bot as an artifact. In the check stage add a check job that runs only on the dev branch, uses the same before_script and cache, adds the clippy component with rustup component add clippy, then runs cargo clippy. No deploy jobs are defined but the deploy stage is present.
